text.title: Indie Postmortem — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the public postmortem post shape + paired private debrief. Author or supporting agent must satisfy these contracts before publishing.

forbidden.pattern: outcome.metrics has fewer than 5 concrete numbers OR any metric.value is a vague word ("some", "few", "many", "slow")
what_we_learned items collapsed with what_wed_do_differently items (one mixed list)
reflection text uses second/third-person blame phrasing: "they should have", "Notion didn't", "the market failed to"
private debrief contents accidentally pasted into public_post
published before scripts/blame-scan.py + scripts/privacy-scan.py pass clean
what_we_learned items that are platitudes ("startups are hard", "validation matters") without context-specific detail

allowed-transformations.transformation: Aggregate similar metrics into ranges + notes (e.g., "MRR ranged $40-$99 over 6 months").
Reference an external document (cohort analysis, customer-interview write-up) instead of inlining if too long.
Anonymize specific user quotes (replace names with role: "a daily-Notion-user beta tester said...").

list.item: 4-part arc present: setup / attempt / outcome / reflection (r1)
What-we-learned and what-we'd-do-differently are SEPARATE sections (r3)
scripts/privacy-scan.py: no PII or NDA-sensitive content remaining
Trusted reader has reviewed the draft
